title: Maestro: Overture
description: Adds thematic music to structures and key events, powered by Maestro!
body:
###
Maestro: Overture is a music resource pack built for the [Maestro](https://modrinth.com/mod/maestro-music) framework, adding handcrafted, thematic music to structures and key events across the world.


## Extending Vanilla Atmosphere Overture is designed to complement Minecraft's vanilla tone rather than replace it. The added music integrates seamlessly with existing tracks, enhancing exploration and events without overwhelming the original atmosphere. ## Current Music Coverage At the moment, custom music is implemented for **8 major structures** as well as a small set of **key environmental events**. This coverage represents the current scope of the system and will expand over time.


## Requires Maestro Maestro: Overture is a music resource pack and requires the [Maestro](https://modrinth.com/mod/maestro-music) mod to function. Without Maestro, the pack will not affect music playback. ## Royalty-Free Music All music included in Maestro: Overture is royalty-free and safe to use in videos, streams, and other content. Some tracks may require attribution, but no royalties or special permissions are needed. ## Attribution & Licensing Some tracks are composed by [Kevin MacLeod](https://incompetech.com) and are licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International **(CC BY 4.0)** license. Proper attribution is included where required.
